session.user:
Run the following CI checks and report results. This is READ-ONLY - do not modify any files.
1. Run ruff check on these specific files: - tests/tui/commands/test_run_registry.py
2. Run pytest on: - tests/commands/run/test_cancel.py - tests/commands/run/test_retry.py - tests/tui/commands/test_run_registry.py
Report all results.
session.assistant: I'll run the CI checks you've specified. Let me start by running ruff check and then pytest on the designated files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run pytest tests/commands/run/test_cancel.py tests/commands/run/test_retry.py tests/tui/commands/test_run_registry.py -v
Run pytest on cancel, retry, and run_registry tests

session.tool_result:

tests/commands/run/test_cancel.py . [ 5%] tests/commands/run/test_retry.py .. [ 15%] tests/tui/commands/test_run_registry.py ................ [100%]
============================== 19 passed in 0.91s ==============================
